name: Senolytics registry surveillance coverage repair follow-up 3

scope.question: coverage_repair: ClinicalTrials.gov surveillance for deferred fisetin frailty registries NCT03430037 and NCT03675724 plus bounded senolytics, D+Q, fisetin, and senescence-targeting term checks.

summary: Retrieved ClinicalTrials.gov v2 source snapshots for NCT03430037 and NCT03675724, confirmed both are enrolling by invitation with no posted results section, and proposed source, study, outcome, result, finding, search-log, screening-run, and coverage-assessment updates through the coverage-gap candidate change. Broader term surveillance was logged and screened enough to identify additional deferred active/recruiting senolytic candidates that still require source snapshots before no-results records can be added.

search_log.summary: Returned one registry hit, NCT03430037; the study-specific v2 snapshot was fetched and retained as snapshot-nct-03430037-clinicaltrials-v2-2026-06-30.
Returned one registry hit, NCT03675724; the study-specific v2 snapshot was fetched and retained as snapshot-nct-03675724-clinicaltrials-v2-2026-06-30.

search_log.query: senolytics; senolytic; dasatinib quercetin; D+Q; fisetin; senescence targeting; cellular senescence
search_log.summary: Bounded term checks logged exact counts and screened direct senolytic/fisetin/D+Q hits; additional current candidates were deferred because this context pack only declared source-snapshot output paths for NCT03430037 and NCT03675724.
